title: Axiomatic Attribution for Deep Networks

supporters: Integrated Gradients 在 Google 应用

abstract_nl: We identify two fundamental axioms—Sensitivity and Implementation Invariance—that attribution methods ought to satisfy. We show Integrated Gradients is the unique path method satisfying them.
key_contributions: Integrated Gradients (IG): path integral along straight line
Path methods 满足 Implementation Invariance (因基于梯度)
Theorem 1: IG 是唯一对称保持的 path method

key_quotes.verbatim: Sensitivity (a) and Implementation Invariance are two fundamental axioms

process_meta.[INFER]: STY17 的 Symmetry-Preserving ≠ Shapley Symmetry —— STY17 是 input-level, Shapley 是 game-level
process_meta.[HUNCH]: STY17 不区分 f vs f̂ —— 全部看 f̂。这是 SC 创新空间的来源
